sections.heading: Punishment for Murder
sections.body_text: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Attempt to Commit Murder
sections.body_text: Whoever attempts to commit murder shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine. If hurt is caused during the attempt, the punishment may extend to imprisonment for life.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Culpable Homicide Not Amounting to Murder
sections.body_text: Whoever causes death by an act with the intention of causing death, or with the intention of causing such bodily injury as is likely to cause death, shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Rape
sections.body_text: Whoever commits rape shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than ten years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Gang Rape
sections.body_text: Where a woman is raped by one or more persons constituting a group, each of those persons shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than twenty years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Rape of a Minor
sections.body_text: Whoever commits rape on a woman under sixteen years of age shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than twenty years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Rape Resulting in Death or Persistent Vegetative State
sections.body_text: If the rape of a woman results in her death or causes her to be in a persistent vegetative state, the offender shall be punished with death or rigorous imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Sexual Assault by a Person in Authority
sections.body_text: If a person in a position of authority commits rape, they shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than ten years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Repeated Offenders of Rape
sections.body_text: Whoever has been previously convicted of an offence of rape and is subsequently convicted of rape shall be punished with death or rigorous imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Sexual Harassment
sections.body_text: Whoever commits sexual harassment shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Kidnapping
sections.body_text: Whoever kidnaps any person shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Kidnapping for Ransom
sections.body_text: Whoever kidnaps or abducts any person for ransom shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Punishment for Theft
sections.body_text: Whoever commits theft shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Punishment for Robbery
sections.body_text: Whoever commits robbery shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Punishment for Dacoity
sections.body_text: Whoever commits dacoity shall be punished with imprisonment for life, or with rigorous imprisonment for a term which may extend to ten years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Punishment for Cheating
sections.body_text: Whoever cheats shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Punishment for Forgery
sections.body_text: Whoever commits forgery shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to two years, or with fine, or with both.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Punishment for Criminal Breach of Trust
sections.body_text: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVII - Offences Against Property

sections.heading: Dowry Death
sections.body_text: If the death of a woman is caused by burns or bodily injury or occurs under suspicious circumstances within seven years of her marriage and it is shown that she was subjected to cruelty or harassment by her husband or his relatives in connection with any demand for dowry, such death shall be called 'dowry death', and the husband or relative shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than seven years but which may extend to imprisonment for life.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives of Husband
sections.body_text: Whoever, being the husband or the relative of the husband of a woman, subjects her to cruelty shall be punished with imprisonment for a term which may extend to three years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: XVI - Offences Affecting the Human Body

sections.heading: Sedition or Acts Against the Sovereignty of India
sections.body_text: Whoever, by words, signs, or visible representation, or otherwise, brings or attempts to bring hatred or contempt, or excites disaffection towards the sovereignty, unity, and integrity of India, shall be punished with imprisonment for life, to which fine may be added, or with imprisonment which may extend to seven years, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.chapter: VI - Offences Against the State

sections.heading: Punishment for Criminal Conspiracy
sections.body_text: Whoever is a party to a criminal conspiracy to commit an offence punishable with death, imprisonment for life, or rigorous imprisonment for a term of two years or more, shall be punished in the same manner as if they had abetted such offence.
sections.chapter: V - Abetment and Criminal Conspiracy

sections.heading: Abetment of a Thing
sections.body_text: A person abets the doing of a thing if they instigate any person to do that thing, engage in a conspiracy to do that thing, or intentionally aid the doing of that thing. Punishment depends on the nature of the offence abetted.
sections.chapter: V - Abetment and Criminal Conspiracy
